choices.text: close[1] — [N] accesses N bars ago. close[0] = current, close[1] = previous bar, close[2] = 2 bars ago. Series indexed by bar position.

questions.explanation: [N] for historical reference; close[1] = prior bar.

choices.text: Use barstate.isconfirmed — only fires on closed bars. Avoids signal flips intra-bar as price moves. Critical for backtest fidelity + live alerts.
